title: Step CI REST API Test Workflow
description: Example Step CI YAML workflow for testing a REST API with authentication and response validation
content:
version: '1.1'
name: REST API Tests
env:
  BASE_URL: https://api.example.com
  API_KEY: ${{secrets.API_KEY}}
config:
  http:
    baseURL: ${{env.BASE_URL}}
tests:
  create-and-retrieve-item:
    name: Create and Retrieve Item
    steps:
      - name: Create Item
        http:
          url: /items
          method: POST
          headers:
            Authorization: Bearer ${{env.API_KEY}}
            Content-Type: application/json
          body:
            name: Test Item
            description: Created by Step CI
          check:
            status: 201
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                id:
                  type: string
                name:
                  type: string
          captures:
            item_id:
              jsonpath: $.id
      - name: Retrieve Item
        http:
          url: /items/${{captures.item_id}}
          method: GET
          headers:
            Authorization: Bearer ${{env.API_KEY}}
          check:
            status: 200
            jsonpath:
              $.name: Test Item
            performance:
              firstByte:
                lte: 500
